entry.title: Hello World: Math on This Blog

link.title: Hello World: Math on This Blog

entry.content:
This is a sample post to show how math rendering works.

Inline math works with dollar signs: the energy-mass relation is $E = mc^2$.

Display math uses double dollars:

$$ \int_0^\infty e^{-x^2} \, dx = \frac{\sqrt{\pi}}{2} $$

You can write matrices:

$$ A = \begin{bmatrix} 1 & 2 \\ 3 & 4 \end{bmatrix} $$

And summations:

$$ \sum_{n=1}^{\infty} \frac{1}{n^2} = \frac{\pi^2}{6} $$

Everything is just markdown with LaTeX between $...$ or $$...$$. Edit this file on your phone via GitHub to add new posts.
entry.summary: This is a sample post to show how math rendering works.

entry.title: First Life Post
entry.content:
This is the life section – a place for personal reflections, stories, and things outside of tech.

Write about anything here. Travel, books, ideas, experiences. Just markdown.
entry.summary: This is the life section – a place for personal reflections, stories, and things outside of tech.
